steps.t: Téothic is at the training hall of Aldburg in the eastern part of the town. Arcil asked you to aid the people of Aldburg as they try to bring back the…
Téothic has asked you to build a barricade to help with the defence of the training hall.
Téothic is at the training hall of Aldburg in the eastern part of the city. You should speak with Téothic and let him know your work is finished.
Wilflad is at the stable of Aldburg. Téothic suggested that Wilflad might need help at the stable.
Wilflad asked for the beams of the stable to be repaired in order to bring more stalls into use.
Wilflad is at the stable of Aldburg. The beams have been repaired, and now more horses will be able to be housed in the stable. You should speak with …
Bertred, Quartermaster of Aldburg, is at his house in the western part of the city. Wilflad believes that the Quartermaster might also be able to use …
Bertred has asked for assistance mending his fence.
Bertred is at his house in the western part of Aldburg. You should let Bertred know that you have mended his fence.
Thane Arcil is at the Mead Hall of Aldburg. You should return to Thane Arcil and inform him that you have aided the people of Aldburg.
